mapper.insert: INSERT INTO regularization_application (employee_id, formal_salary, probation_summary, result_type, extended_months, supervisor_comment, status, submitter_id, encryption_version) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{formalSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{probationSummary}, #{resultType}, #{extendedMonths}, #{supervisorComment}, #{status}, #{submitterId}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, COALESCE(formal_salary, CAST(formal_salary AS CHAR)) AS formal_salary, probation_summary, supervisor_comment, status, submitter_id, create_time, update_time, encryption_version FROM regularization_application WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT ra.id, ra.employee_id, e.name AS employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, p.position_name, e.entry_date AS hire_date, e.regular_date AS probation_end_date, COALESCE(ra.formal_salary, CAST(ra.formal_salary AS CHAR)) AS formal_salary, ra.probation_summary, ra.supervisor_comment, ra.status, ra.submitter_id, su.username AS submitter_name, ra.create_time, ra.update_time FROM regularization_application ra JOIN employee e ON ra.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ra.submitter_id = su.id WHERE ra.id = #{id}
